overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage inside a medieval-style tavern with wooden architecture and warm ambient lighting. The player character explores the main hall of 'The Three Broomsticks' while NPCs occupy the upper balcony and seating areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern hall with upper balcony

agents.ego_description: slowly walking through the tavern main floor, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: seated at wooden table facing the wall, remaining stationary
standing on upper balcony behind railing, looking down at the main floor

entered.detail: upper level walkway with wooden balustrades spanning the width of the hall
circular wrought iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from ceiling
wooden tavern sign with gold lettering mounted above the central archway
large stone archway with glowing fireplace visible in the background
wooden dining tables with benches arranged throughout the main floor

segments.scene_description: The player character moves slowly through the dimly lit main hall of a medieval tavern, featuring exposed wooden beams and an upper balcony. An NPC stands on the balcony overlooking the room while another sits at a table to the right. Warm light emanates from wall sconces and a distant fireplace beneath the 'Three Broomsticks' sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the dimly lit interior of a medieval tavern, gradually revealing the architectural depth of the main hall. It begins by gliding slowly through the room, where warm light from wall sconces casts soft glows against exposed wooden beams. As the camera advances, the perspective opens up to show an NPC overlooking the space from an upper balcony while another patron sits quietly at a nearby table. The scene then shifts its focus toward the far end of the hall, where the flickering light of a distant fireplace illuminates the Three Broomsticks sign.
